description: Model a mechanical compression spring with a flattened (ground) bottom end in SolveSpace. The wire profile is a 3.0 mm diameter circle centered 10.0 mm from the origin on the horizontal axis. The helix must have a pitch of 6.0 mm and 5.0 turns. Flatten the bottom of the spring by performing a Boolean subtraction at the XY plane to remove the wire material below Z=0. Save the model to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/grounded_spring.slvs.
